# Piyush Varanjani

> Builder. Currently in San Francisco, building in AI.

## About

Piyush Varanjani sleeps happy when he creates. Currently living in San Francisco, building in AI.

Previously worked on product and growth at Stripe, Wise, and a few other startups. Started coding in a computer lab in a small city in India, made first real money in a tech internship in Israel, and since then been building/scaling startups across Asia (Singapore), San Francisco, and Europe (Estonia, London).

If he were not into tech, he'd be a struggling director or a happily frustrated technocrat.

## Investments

Some friends who he got to invest in:
- Locofy.ai: Turn your designs into production-ready frontend code
- Defog.ai (YC W23): AI data analyst
- Skorlife: Broaden access to credit in Indonesia

Not actively investing in any new startups, except his own.

## Creative Work

- 42 - an AI film made with Runway
- Adu Ni Cha - Ginger Tea (>200k views) - A short film on finding love
- Bharatnatyam and semi-classical dance videos
- Kalki News - John Oliver style show for Indian audience
